# anthropic_federation_issuer (Resource)

Registers an external OIDC issuer for RFC 7523 jwt-bearer federation (GitHub Actions, GitLab, Buildkite, Terraform Cloud, Google, etc). **Requires OAuth Bearer auth.** The JWKS source is polymorphic — pick `discovery` (default), `explicit_url`, or `inline` and fill the matching fields.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Federation REQUIRES OAuth Bearer auth.

# Common case — GitHub Actions OIDC, using discovery (default).
resource "anthropic_federation_issuer" "github_actions" {
  name       = "github-actions"
  issuer_url = "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com"
  jwks_type  = "discovery"
}

# Alternative — explicit JWKS URL.
# resource "anthropic_federation_issuer" "self_hosted" {
#   name      = "internal-idp"
#   issuer_url = "https://idp.internal.example.com"
#   jwks_type  = "explicit_url"
#   jwks_url   = "https://idp.internal.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
# }

# Inline JWKS (static key set).
# resource "anthropic_federation_issuer" "static" {
#   name       = "static-jwks"
#   issuer_url = "https://example.com/issuer"
#   jwks_type  = "inline"
#   jwks_keys_json = jsonencode([{ kty = "RSA", n = "...", e = "AQAB", kid = "key-1" }])
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issuer_url` (String) The `iss` claim value to match against. JWTs must match exactly.
- `name` (String) Slug identifier. Unique within the org. Immutable after creation.

### Optional

- `check_jti` (Boolean) Enforce JTI single-use (replay protection). Defaults to true.
- `jwks_ca_cert_pem` (String) Optional custom CA (PEM) for TLS verification of the JWKS fetch.
- `jwks_discovery_base` (String) discovery mode only — override the discovery base URL when it differs from issuer_url.
- `jwks_keys_json` (String) inline mode only — JSON array of JWK objects.
- `jwks_type` (String) How signing keys are obtained: `discovery` (default, fetched via OIDC discovery), `explicit_url` (fixed JWKS endpoint), or `inline` (static keys).
- `jwks_url` (String) explicit_url mode only — the JWKS endpoint.
- `max_jwt_lifetime_seconds` (Number) Max iat→exp spread (1-176400 seconds). Defaults to 3600.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
